title: Robot Warrior Form Change Transforming Car Set, Yellow and Green Sports Cars with Battle Accessories, You will receive 1 robot
features: ROBOT WARRIOR: Set includes one transforming robots - one yellow and one green sports car, each with unique battle accessories and weaponry
TRANSFORMING FEATURE: Each robot smoothly converts from a sleek sports car to a powerful warrior robot with articulated joints
BATTLE READY: Comes equipped with turquoise-coloured battle swords and grey combat accessories for enhanced play value
DESIGN DETAILS: Features detailed car styling with sporty accents, racing numbers, and distinctive robot warrior modes
PLAY VALUE: Perfect for imaginative play, these robots offer both vehicle and combat modes with interchangeable battle gear
description: Product Description Transform playtime into an epic adventure with the Robot Warrior Form Change set! This dynamic duo features two stunning sports cars - one in vibrant yellow and another in striking green - that convert into mighty robot warriors. Each figure comes equipped with battle accessories, including sleek turquoise swords and grey tactical weapons, making every transformation sequence more thrilling. The sports cars showcase detailed designs with metallic-look wheels, aerodynamic styling, and distinctive racing numbers. When transformed, the robots stand ready for action with articulated limbs and impressive warrior stances. The smooth transformation mechanism allows young warriors to switch between car and robot modes for endless play scenarios. Perfect for imaginative play, these robot warriors bring together the excitement of high-speed racing and robotic combat. The set includes two complete transformer figures with their respective accessories, offering twice the action-packed entertainment. Ideal for collectors and young robot enthusiasts alike, these detailed figures promise hours of engaging play. You will receive 1 Robot Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
